articles.title: $60Mn withdrawn from HyperLiquid on North Korea Hacker Fears
articles.description: $60Mn worth of USDC has been withdrawn from the HyperLiquid trading platform as wallet addresses linked to North Korean hackers have allegedly begun trading on the platform Experts believe these trades, which have accumulated a $700,000 loss are tests for weaknesses. articles.title: Michael Saylor Urges Jeff Bezos to Invest in Bitcoin
articles.description: Speculation about Jeff Bezos’ rumored $600 million wedding budget has stirred discussions online, even prompting a suggestion from Bitcoin advocate Michael Saylor. The post Michael Saylor Urges Jeff Bezos to Invest in Bitcoin appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Is Litecoin (LTC) merge mining the new trend for tokens?
articles.description: Binance Pool offers the widest selection of merged mining coins for Litecoin (LTC) block producers. Addition to Binance Pool does not signal listings on the exchange.

articles.title: UAE Rumored to Hold $40 Billion in Bitcoin
articles.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) now holds $40 billion in Bitcoin, according to a report shared by Binance founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao. The Gulf nation has spent years building the foundation for this moment. Government initiatives, progressive regulations, and an open-door policy for blockchain businesses have all contributed to this Bitcoin boom. Dubai’s crypto empire […]

articles.title: End of Altcoin Season? Glassnode Co-Founders Warn Alts in Danger of Lagging Behind After Last Week’s Correction
articles.description: The creators of the crypto analytics firm Glassnode are warning that altcoins could lose all bullish momentum following last week’s market correction.
